candidates.text: One night well after midnight in July 1990 I drove a Jeep off a cliff in the Montana woods, landed upside down in a creek, but miraculously survived. Around six in the morning I got home from the ER. My answering machine was blinking. Four messages from my mother in Minnesota, increasingly frantic, demanding that I call her -- the first call time stamped just minutes after the accident. I called her. She picked up instantly. I used Pruna P-Video-Avatar to turn this original character into a talking avatar that can explain coding concepts, guide users through tutorials, answer FAQs, or even act as a virtual game NPC. What impressed me most wasn't just the lip sync, it was how quickly a static character became someone who could actually communicate ideas. Created with Pruna P-Video-Avatar @PrunaAI #madebypruna
